nasb.text: “At the end of every third year you shall bring out all the tithe of your produce in that year, and shall deposit it in your town.

esv.text: “At the end of every three years you shall bring out all the tithe of your produce in the same year and lay it up within your towns.

cnv.text: “每三年之末，你要把那一年的全部出產的十分之一取出來，積存在你的城裡；

ccb.text: “每逢第三年末，你们要把那年所有出产的十分之一拿出来，存放在你们的城里，
